question: Calculate total revenue for all completed orders
ground_truth_sql: SELECT SUM(total_amount) AS total_revenue FROM orders WHERE status = 'completed';

question: Show payment method breakdown with total amount collected
ground_truth_sql: SELECT payment_method, COUNT(*) AS transaction_count, SUM(amount) AS total_amount FROM payments WHERE status = 'completed' GROUP BY payment_method ORDER BY total_amount DESC;

question: Find orders that do not have any associated payment
ground_truth_sql: SELECT o.order_id, o.order_date, o.total_amount, o.status FROM orders o LEFT JOIN payments p ON o.order_id = p.order_id WHERE p.payment_id IS NULL;
notes: Anti-join to detect orders missing payments

question: Calculate daily revenue for the last 30 days
ground_truth_sql: SELECT DATE(o.order_date) AS date, SUM(o.total_amount) AS daily_revenue FROM orders o WHERE o.order_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days' AND o.status = 'completed' GROUP BY DATE(o.order_date) ORDER BY date;
notes: INTERVAL date filter + DATE_TRUNC equivalent; may return empty on old seed data

question: Find orders where payment amount does not match order total
ground_truth_sql: SELECT o.order_id, o.total_amount AS order_total, COALESCE(SUM(p.amount), 0) AS payment_total, ABS(o.total_amount - COALESCE(SUM(p.amount), 0)) AS difference FROM orders o LEFT JOIN payments p ON o.order_id = p.order_id GROUP BY o.order_id, o.total_amount HAVING ABS(o.total_amount - COALESCE(SUM(p.amount), 0)) > 0.01;
notes: COALESCE + HAVING ABS for data quality check

question: What is the total pending payment amount across all orders?
ground_truth_sql: SELECT SUM(amount) AS total_pending FROM payments WHERE status = 'pending';

question: Show total revenue contribution of each product category
ground_truth_sql: SELECT c.name AS category, SUM(oi.subtotal) AS total_revenue FROM categories c JOIN products p ON c.category_id = p.category_id JOIN order_items oi ON p.product_id = oi.product_id GROUP BY c.category_id, c.name ORDER BY total_revenue DESC;

question: What is the average revenue per completed order?
ground_truth_sql: SELECT AVG(total_amount) AS avg_order_value FROM orders WHERE status = 'completed';

question: Which day of the week has the highest total order revenue?
ground_truth_sql: SELECT TO_CHAR(order_date, 'Day') AS day_of_week, EXTRACT(DOW FROM order_date) AS dow_num, SUM(total_amount) AS total_revenue FROM orders WHERE status = 'completed' GROUP BY TO_CHAR(order_date, 'Day'), EXTRACT(DOW FROM order_date) ORDER BY total_revenue DESC LIMIT 1;
notes: EXTRACT + TO_CHAR for day of week; may return empty if no completed orders

question: Show monthly revenue for the last 12 months
ground_truth_sql: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', o.order_date) AS month, SUM(oi.subtotal) AS monthly_revenue FROM orders o JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id WHERE o.order_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '12 months' GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', o.order_date) ORDER BY month;
notes: 12-month INTERVAL window; may return empty on old seed data
